title: Mighty Guardian: Lost Avian
body:
This Mod made by Vietnamese
The mod is based on the Vietnamese superhero series called Chiến thần Lạc Hồng
The Chiến Thần Lạc Hồng tells the story of the war between the guardian and the Northern Monsters.
The film is directed by Do Duc Muoi from Transform Studio

In this mod, everyone will meet characters such as (Ngạ Quỷ) hungry ghosts, (Xà Tinh) snake spirits, (Rết tinh) centipedes, (Chiến thần lạc hồng) Mighty Guardian,... as well as wearing Lac Hong armor.
I hope you like it

Mod requires Geckolib (4.4.7 or above)

Mod cannot be used in parallel with optifine
